sglang.title: [Fix] Add fallback for flashinfer allreduce fusion
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When the version of nvidia-ml-pyis low, such as12.570.86`, flashinfer all reduce fusion will fail. The current code doesn't include any fallback, so the server launches, but only making garbage outputs.
This PR adds a fallback, so the allreduce fusion api can at least return correct resul

When a user passes a template name (e.g. "tool_use") instead of actual Jinja content via the chat_template parameter, resolve_chat_template returned it verbatim. The downstream resolve_chat_template_kwargs then parsed "tool_use" as trivial Jinja, found no template variables, and

vllm.author: sbeurnier
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Remove explicit pin_memory() call in async_copy_to_gpu that causes sporadic stalls under high concurrency
Replace with direct out.copy_(x, non_blocking=True) which lets the CUDA driver handle the transfer
